prestazioni: Upgrade to a bespoke **AMR-tuned 4.0L twin-turbocharged V12 (AE31)** with forged Mahle pistons (9.0:1 CR), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft, paired with a **Weistec Engineering Stage 3+ turbo kit** featuring Garrett GTX5533R turbos, titanium wastegates, and a custom 4.5-inch stainless steel intercooler core from **Bell Intercoolers** for sustained 950+ HP on 100-octane fuel.

Installation of a **Motec M150 ECU** with full CAN bus integration, paired with a **Pectel SQ6M+ PDM** for precise fuel and ignition mapping, including a **Bosch Motorsport 8-hole high-flow direct injectors** and **NGK R8993-10 laser-iridium spark plugs** for optimized combustion under extreme boost (2.2 bar peak).

Chassis reinforcement via a **T45 steel roll cage** from **Custom Cages UK**, integrated with **Ohlins TTX46 MkII coilovers** (3-way adjustable damping) and **AP Racing CP9660 6-piston front/4-piston rear calipers** with **380mm carbon-ceramic rotors** (CCM-R) for track-ready stopping power.
estetica: Full **RML Group carbon-fiber widebody conversion** with integrated **Aston Martin Racing (AMR) GT3-inspired front splitter**, **custom 3D-printed rear diffuser** (CFRP, 30% downforce increase at 150 mph), and **Vorsteiner V-FF 107 20-inch forged wheels** (9.5J front, 12J rear) wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires** (265/30 R20 front, 325/25 R20 rear).

Exterior finish in **Bespoke Aston Martin Q by RML ‘Valour GT’ livery**—a matte **Satin Black Pearl** base with **Britannia Silver** and **Lime Essence** hand-painted racing stripes, complemented by **PPF (Paint Protection Film) from XPEL Ultimate Plus** on high-impact zones.

Interior overhaul with **Recaro Pole Position SPG XL seats** (carbon-fiber shells, Alcantara/leather upholstery), **Schroth Profi II-6 harnesses**, and a **MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel** (suede, quick-release hub) paired with a **Motec C127 dash display** for real-time telemetry (boost, AFR, lap times).
